info.title: Event info
info.instructionsBodyOne: Only 20 photos are allowed per guest.
info.instructionsBodyTwo: You can also add a little note to each photo before sharing it with everyone.
info.uploadBody: You’ll have a 24-hour window to upload pictures, so there’s plenty of time to share your favorite moments.
info.instructionsBodyThree: To download a photo, press and hold the picture or tap the download button.

welcome.landingText: Your app for the night to capture and share moments, one polaroid at a time.
welcome.landingSubText: A shared gallery of polaroid moments.
welcome.installHint: Keep the wedding app on your home screen for the smoothest experience.
welcome.installDescription: Your browser can install this app right from here.
welcome.iosInstallHint: On iPhone, open the share sheet and choose Add to Home Screen.
welcome.iosStepOne: Tap the Share button in Safari.
welcome.iosStepThree: Open the app from the new icon.
welcome.greetingSubText: Add your name so your photos stay linked to you through the night.
welcome.noteTwo: You can add a note to any photo.

instructions.body: You can share up to 20 photos from the night. Every memory you post is visible to everyone here, so the celebration stays beautifully shared.
instructions.notes: Take a photo now or come back later to upload one.

app.placeholder: Shared memories will appear here soon.
app.linkPrompt: Add your name in the greeting so your photos are paired with you.
